title: Coffee Brew Ratio Calculator — Dial in Your Perfect Cup
description: Calculate the exact coffee-to-water ratio for pour-over, French press, espresso, and cold brew. Simple, accurate, and completely free.

schemas.name: Coffee Brew Ratio Calculator
schemas.description: Calculate the exact coffee-to-water ratio for pour-over, French press, espresso, and cold brew. Enter your coffee weight to find out how much water to use.
